content.body:
The 4 managers (engineer, designer, pm, marketing) are now profiles
in .leo/profiles/. Their principles, self-QA checklists, and
escalation rules are preserved as context_injection.

leo.md removed — role already defined in CLAUDE.md + project-identity KB doc.
agents/ directory removed entirely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: refactor: convert legacy agent/manager files into Leo profiles
